editorial_notes.examples: Anchors used: safe_viewport, header, smart_menu, drawer_container, modal_container. Coordinates are normalized 0..1 (except where noted).
editorial_notes.text_reader: v1.4: For any item with modalities.read.available=true, include render.text_reader.enabled=true, modalities.read.content_ref, and content_blocks (or another resolvable content_ref).

notes: v1.3: Liquid UI spatial model (anchors, normalized geometry variants)
v1.4: Text Reader modal contract + content_blocks + modalities.read.content_ref

DigiTerra.purpose: in-world lore, immersive narrative, mythos-first experiences

Terra.purpose: updates/news/patch-notes and bridges to real world context

metaTerra/or.tone: convergence realm (utopia metaTerra vs dystopia metaTerror)
metaTerra/or.purpose: where DigiTerra and Terra converge; future-facing solarpunk vs cautionary dystopia
